description: New enquiry entered from call, WhatsApp, website, or manual entry.
Employee has made first call or WhatsApp contact.
Client asked for price, availability, product details, delivery date, or technical details.
Team has shared product, price, availability, photos, catalogue, or delivery information.
Client asked for quotation, invoice, receipt, catalogue, GST details, or agreement.
Team sent quotation, invoice, receipt, catalogue, or agreement.
Client needs another call, WhatsApp, or email on a future date.
Price, discount, quantity, delivery, or payment terms are being discussed.
Order is almost confirmed but advance or full payment is pending.
Client confirmed order by call, WhatsApp, email, or payment.
Goods or service delivery is completed.
Post-delivery call for satisfaction, feedback, repeat order, or complaint.
Client is inactive now but may continue later.
Client will not proceed or bought elsewhere.
